name: Almond Fruit Pizza Squares
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 375°F. Separate dough into 4 long rectangles. Place rectangles crosswise in an ungreased jelly roll pan; press over the bottom and 1 inch up the sides to form a crust. Seal perforations. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar. Bake at 375°F for 14 to 19 minutes until golden brown. Cool completely.
Combine cream cheese, almond paste, almond extract, and 2 tablespoons sugar in a bowl until smooth. Spread evenly over cooled crust; top with fruit. Heat preserves in a small saucepan until melted. Brush over the fruit. Sprinkle with toasted almonds. Cover; store in refrigerator.
